<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.0.3 Chrome/140.0.7339.249 Electron/38.7.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.0.3" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="jqHPfkNXcNN6sUwfSim6"> <mxGraphModel dx="3003" dy="-10055" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" value="" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=none;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="-558.92" y="39250" width="1045" height="570" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3" value="Packet from
Container" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="-490.83" y="39340.5" width="230.83" height="88.99" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4" value="FORWARD chain
filter table" style="rhombus;strokeWidth=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="-157.7" y="39278" width="215" height="215" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" value="Routing
Decision" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="195.97000000000006" y="39340.5" width="204.03" height="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6" value="POSTROUTING
chain
nat table" style="rhombus;strokeWidth=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="187.99" y="39574.75" width="220" height="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="7" value="External
Interface" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="-214.02999999999992" y="39639.75" width="204.03" height="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8" value="Internet" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="-490.83000000000004" y="39639.75" width="148.56" height="90.25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="9" value="" style="startArrow=oval;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;rounded=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=18;shadow=1;strokeColor=default;strokeWidth=2;align=center;verticalAlign=bottom;fontColor=default;labelBackgroundColor=default;elbow=vertical;startFill=1;endSize=10;startSize=8;" edge="1" source="3" target="4" parent="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" value="ACCEPT" style="startArrow=oval;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;rounded=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=18;shadow=1;strokeColor=default;strokeWidth=2;align=center;verticalAlign=bottom;fontColor=default;labelBackgroundColor=default;elbow=vertical;startFill=1;endSize=10;startSize=8;" edge="1" source="4" target="5" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="-0.0317" y="5" relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points" /> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" value="" style="startArrow=oval;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;rounded=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=18;shadow=1;strokeColor=default;strokeWidth=2;align=center;verticalAlign=bottom;fontColor=default;labelBackgroundColor=default;elbow=vertical;startFill=1;endSize=10;startSize=8;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" edge="1" source="5" target="6" parent="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="12" value="MASQUERADE" style="startArrow=oval;endArrow=block;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;rounded=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=18;shadow=1;strokeColor=default;strokeWidth=2;align=center;verticalAlign=bottom;fontColor=default;labelBackgroundColor=default;elbow=vertical;startFill=1;endSize=10;startSize=8;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" edge="1" source="6" target="7" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="-0.035" y="-5" relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points" /> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="13" value="" style="startArrow=oval;endArrow=block;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;rounded=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=18;shadow=1;strokeColor=default;strokeWidth=2;align=center;verticalAlign=bottom;fontColor=default;labelBackgroundColor=default;elbow=vertical;startFill=1;endSize=10;startSize=8;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" edge="1" source="7" target="8" parent="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points" /> <mxPoint x="-350" y="39685" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
